---
title: "Computer Engineering Design Studio (CMPE 246)"
author:
  - name: Fei Wang
    affiliation: <br>March 9, 2026
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: theme.scss
        margin: 0.04
        incremental: true  
        code-block-height: 300px
        menu: false
        slide-number: true
        revealjs-plugins:
          - chalkboard
---

{{< include slides/01-intro.md >}}
{{< include slides/02-spi.md >}}
{{< include slides/03-handle.md >}}
